item.title: Movie Review: ‘Minions & Monsters’
item.description: In theaters on July 1 is ‘Minions & Monsters,’ the latest spin-off from the ‘Despicable Me’ franchise, another prequel following the earlier misadventures of the chattering characters. This time, they’re causing problems in 1920s Hollywood.

item.title: Claude Fable 5 jetzt in Notion verfügbar
item.description: Claude Fable 5 ist jetzt als Modelloption in Notion verfügbar und richtet sich an die komplexesten Custom Agents und Workers. Notion hat Fable 5 öffentlich als das Modell für die […]

item.title: Synced Blocks zwischen Workspaces kopieren
item.description: Synced Blocks lassen sich über Seiten hinweg kopieren und synchronisieren, und Notions Dokumentation schließt das Synchronisieren von Blöcken über Workspaces hinweg ausdrücklich ein. Notions Hilfeartikel zu Synced Blocks beschreibt, wie […]

item.title: Neue Tastaturkürzel
item.description: Notion hat einen eigenen Satz an zweibuchstabigen Slash-Befehlen eingeführt, um die einfache Navigation im Workspace wiederherzustellen. Die Designänderung kommt, nachdem eine kleine Umformulierung der Option “Dashboard view” versehentlich das altbewährte […]

item.title: Microsoft Outlook AI Connector für Notion
item.description: Notion hat einen dedizierten Microsoft Outlook AI Connector veröffentlicht, mit dem Teams ihre Outlook-Postfächer direkt mit Notion AI verbinden können – für nahtlose tool-übergreifende Suche und kontextbezogene Antworten. Dieses Update […]

item.title: Notion AI: GLM 5.2 Integration
item.description: Notion hat sein Multi-Model-Ökosystem erweitert und GLM 5.2 zu seiner Modellauswahl hinzugefügt – ein leistungsstarkes Frontier-Class-Modell, entwickelt von Zhipu AI. Optimiert für die Verarbeitung von riesigem Engineering-Kontext und autonomen Aufgaben, […]

item.title: Der Layout Builder funktioniert jetzt auf Mobilgeräten
item.description: Notions Layout Builder funktioniert jetzt auf dem Smartphone, sodass du Datenbank-Seitenlayouts direkt in der mobilen App neu anordnen kannst. Notions offizielle Layout-Dokumentation beschreibt jetzt Mobile-Support für den Layout Builder, inklusive […]

item.title: Bis zu 15 Pins im Database Page Layout
item.description: Notion-Nutzer wünschen sich “unendliche Pins”, also die Möglichkeit, mehr Elemente anzupinnen, als die heutige UI in Datenbank-Seitenlayouts komfortabel zulässt. Im Layout-Builder von Notion sind angepinnte Eigenschaften derzeit begrenzt (Notions eigene […]

item.title: Custom Agent Duplizierung und eingeschränkter Zugriff
item.description: Du kannst jetzt einen Custom Agent duplizieren, um deine eigene private Kopie zu erstellen. Notions Dokumentation gibt an, dass die Kopie standardmäßig privat ist, und Notion verwendet die Berechtigungen der […]

item.title: Audio in Notion Meeting Notes hochladen
item.description: Notion hat offiziell die Möglichkeit ausgerollt, vorab aufgenommene Audiodateien direkt in den AI Meeting Notes Workflow hochzuladen, und geht damit über die bisherige Beschränkung auf reine Live-Aufnahmen hinaus. Dieses Update […]

item.title: Custom Agents können auf das Team-Verzeichnis zugreifen
item.description: Notion hat seine systemgenerierte People Database vollständig für das Entwickler-Ökosystem geöffnet und führt robusten programmatischen Zugriff über die Notion API, die native ntn CLI und Custom Agents ein. Dieses Update […]

item.title: From S04E10 720p HEVC x265-MeGusta EZTV
item.description: New Episode: From S04E10 720p HEVC x265-MeGusta EZTV

item.title: My Adventures with Superman S03E03 720p HEVC x265-MeGusta EZTV
item.description: New Episode: My Adventures with Superman S03E03 720p HEVC x265-MeGusta EZTV

item.title: Night Sky
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Night Sky.

Night Sky centers around Franklin and Irene York, a couple who years ago discovered a chamber buried in their backyard which inexplicably leads to a strange, deserted planet. They've carefully guarded their secret ever since, but when an enigmatic young man enters their lives, the Yorks' quiet existence is quickly upended, and the mysterious chamber they thought they knew so well turns out to be much more than they could ever have imagined.

item.title: Movie Review: 'Jackass: Best and Last'
item.description: Johnny Knoxville and the gang are back one final time for 'Jackass: Best and Last', opening in theaters June 26th.Related Article: CinemaCon 2026: Paramount PresentationInitial ThoughtsThe last several movies in the franchise have been said to be the last, but this time it really feels like the end.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘The Invite’
item.description: Opening in theaters in limited release on June 26 (expanding on July 10) is ‘The Invite,’ directed by Olivia Wilde, written by Rashida Jones and Will McCormack, and starring Seth Rogen, Olivia Wilde, Penélope Cruz, and Edward Norton.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Supergirl’
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 26 is ‘Supergirl,’ directed by Craig Gillespie, written by Ana Nogueira, and starring Milly Alcock, Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, David Corenswet, and Jason Momoa.

item.title: Paper Girls
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Paper Girls.

Paper Girls follows four young girls who, while out delivering papers on the morning after Halloween in 1988, become unwittingly caught in a conflict between warring factions of time-travelers, sending them on an adventure through time that will save the world. As they travel between our present, the past, and the future — they encounter future versions of themselves and now must choose to embrace or reject their fate. An emotional adventure in which the girls and the women they eventually become are tough, their friendships are authentic, and their journey through time is epic.

item.title: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed.

Paula, a newly divorced mom, falls down a dangerous rabbit hole of blackmail, murder, and youth soccer.

Convinced she witnessed a crime — while simultaneously struggling through a custody battle and an identity crisis — Paula begins her own investigation, one that could unravel a greater conspiracy while also holding the keys to rebuilding her family and sense of self.

item.title: Drops of God
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Drops of God.

Drops of God is set in the world of gastronomy and fine wines, which are in mourning as Alexandre Léger, creator of the famous Léger Wine Guide and emblematic figure in oenology, has just passed away at his home in Tokyo at the age of 60. He left behind a daughter, Camille, who lives in Paris and hasn't seen her father since her parents separated when she was nine years old. When Camille flies to Tokyo and Léger's will is read, she discovers that her father has left her an extraordinary wine collection – the greatest collection in the world according to the experts. But, to claim the inheritance, Camille must compete with a brilliant young oenologist, Issei Tomine, who her father took under his wing and is referred to in Léger's will as his "spiritual son." But is his connection to Issei only spiritual?

item.title: Cape Fear
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Cape Fear.

A storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna and Tom Bowden when Max Cady, the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison - and he wants vengeance.

item.title: R.J. Decker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: R.J. Decker.

R.J. Decker centers on the eponymous R.J. Decker, a disgraced newspaper photographer and ex-con who starts over as a private investigator in the colorful-if-crime-filled world of South Florida, tackling cases that range from slightly odd to outright bizarre with the help of his journalist ex, her police detective wife, and a shadowy new benefactor, a woman from his past who could be his greatest ally... or his one-way ticket back to prison.

item.title: Star City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star City.

Star City is a propulsive, paranoid thriller that takes us back to the key moment in the alt-history retelling of the space race — when the Soviet Union became the first nation to put a man on the moon. But this time, we explore the story from behind the Iron Curtain, showing the lives of the cosmonauts, the engineers and the intelligence officers embedded among them in the Soviet space program, and the risks they all took to propel humanity forward.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Leviticus’
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 19 is ‘Leviticus,’ written and directed by Adrian Chiarella, and starring Joe Bird, Stacy Clausen, Jeremy Blewitt, Davida McKenzie, Ewen Leslie, Nicholas Hope, and Mia Wasikowska.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘The Death of Robin Hood’
item.description: Opening on June 19 is ‘The Death of Robin Hood,’ written and directed by Michael Sarnoski, and starring Hugh Jackman, Bill Skarsgård, Jodie Comer, Murray Bartlett, Noah Jupe, Faith Delaney, and Clive Russell.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Toy Story 5’
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 19 is ‘Toy Story 5,’ directed by Andrew Stanton from a screenplay by Stanton and Kenna Harris, who also co-directed. The film stars Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Greta Lee, Conan O’Brien, Tony Hale, Scarlett Spears, John Ratzenberger, Wallace Shawn, and Annie Potts.

item.title: TV Review: ‘Cape Fear’
item.description: Arriving on Apple TV on June 5th with the first two episodes (and eight more to follow weekly), ‘Cape Fear’ sees recently released convict Max Cady (Javier Bardem) menacing the family of lawyers (played by Amy Adams and Patrick Wilson) who put him in prison in the first place.

item.title: TV Review: ‘X-Men ‘97’ Season 2
item.description: Premiering on Disney+ July 1st is season 2 of the popular animated series ‘X-Men ‘97’, which is a continuation of the classic 1990’s cartoon, ‘X-Men: The Animated Series’.[sc name="tvshow" tvshow_id="82D5RVfbh7xeOP8lUqzrB4" ]The series features the voice work of Ray Chase as Cyclops, Jennifer Hale as Jean Grey, Alison Sealy-Smith as Storm, Cal Dodd as Wolverine, J.

item.description: New Episode: Daredevil S03E08 Upstairs and Downstairs 1080p DSNP WEB-DL DD 5 1 Atmos H 264-playWEB EZTV

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Stop! That! Train!’
item.description: In theaters on June 12 is ‘Stop! That Train!,’ which sees two train hostesses charged with saving the passengers of a high-speed rail service that is headed for a terrible storm front. The new movie stars RuPaul, Ginger Minj, Jujubee and a host of celebrity comedy cameos.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Office Romance’
item.description: On Netflix on June 5 is ‘Office Romance,’ the latest project from prolific writer/actor Brett Goldstein (‘Shrinking’) which seeks to update that stalwart of the 2000s, the Jennifer Lopez rom-com.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Disclosure Day’
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 12 is ‘Disclosure Day,’ directed by Steven Spielberg from a script by David Koepp. The film stars Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor, Colman Domingo, Eve Hewson, Wyatt Russell, and Colin Firth.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Scary Movie’
item.description: In theaters on June 5 is ‘Scary Movie,’ the sixth iteration of the horror spoof franchise (the title is a nod to the fifth ‘Scream’ outing reverting to the original’s name) which finds the likes of Shawn and Keenan Ivory Wayans taking aim at both the main genre and pop culture in general.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Power Ballad’
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 5 is ‘Power Ballad,’ which sees Paul Rudd (‘Ant-Man’) as former rocker Rick, who now spends his days performing at weddings and Nick Jonas (‘Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle’) as Danny, a huge star on the back of being part of a boyband, who is seeking to maintain his edgy status as a solo artist.

item.title: Movie Review: 'Masters of the Universe’ (2026)
item.description: Opening in theaters on June 5th is ‘Masters of the Universe’, which is the second live-action film based on Mattel’s popular toy line and was directed by Travis Knight (‘Bumblebee’).The new film stars Nicholas Galitzine (‘The Sheep Detectives’) as Prince Adam / He-Man, Camila Mendes (‘Palm Springs’) as Teela, Idris Elba (‘Pacific Rim’) as Man-At-Arms, Morena Baccarin (‘Deadpool’) as the Sorceress, Alison Brie (‘Together’) as Evil-Lyn, Jared Leto (‘Morbius’) as Skeletor, and Kristen Wiig (‘Wonder Woman 1984’) as the voice of Roboto.

item.title: Spider-Noir
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spider-Noir.

Spider-Noir tells the story of Ben Reilly, a seasoned, down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, who is forced to grapple with his past life, following a deeply personal tragedy, as the city's one and only superhero.

item.title: Ponies
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ponies.

Moscow, 1977. Two "PONIES" ("persons of no interest" in intelligence speak) work anonymously as secretaries in the American Embassy. That is until their husbands are killed under mysterious circumstances in the USSR, and the pair become CIA operatives. Bea is an over educated, Russian speaking child of Soviet immigrants. Her cohort, Twila, is a small town girl who is as abrasive as she is fearless. Together, they work to uncover a vast Cold War conspiracy and solve the mystery that made them widows in the first place.

item.title: TV Review: ‘The Boroughs’
item.description: Arriving on Netflix on May 21st with all eight episodes, ‘The Boroughs’ is set in a seemingly ideal elder community where something decidedly nasty is lurking in the walls.[sc name="tvshow" tvshow_id="Lw08WSnJvzf17JlU53MrN2" ]With ‘Stranger Things’ creators Matt and Ross Duffer as executive producers, the new show (created by Jeffrey Addiss and Will Matthews) features a cast including Alfred Molina (‘Spider-Man: No Way Home’), Geena Davis (‘Thelma & Louise’), Clarke Peters (‘The Wire’) and Denis O’Hare (‘Dallas Buyers Club').

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Backrooms’
item.description: Opening in theaters on May 29 is ‘Backrooms,’ directed by Kane Parsons and starring Chiwetel Ejiofor, Renate Reinsve, Mark Duplass, Finn Bennett, and Lukita Maxwell.Related Article: Chiwetel Ejiofor Talks Writing and Directing the True Story 'Rob Peace'Initial ThoughtsMay is clearly the new October, at least in 2026.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Pressure’
item.description: Opening in theaters on May 29 is the new World War II drama ‘Pressure,’ directed by Anthony Maras (‘Hotel Mumbai’) and starring Andrew Scott (‘Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery’), Kerry Condon (‘F1’), Damian Lewis (‘Billions’), Chris Messina (‘Air’), and Academy Award winner Brendan Fraser (‘The Whale’) as Dwight D.

item.title: Movie Review: 'The Breadwinner'
item.description: Comedian Nate Bargatze stars in his first feature film, 'The Breadwinner', coming to theaters May 29th. He stars alongside Mandy Moore and Will Forte.Related Article: Moviefone’s 2026 Theatrical and Streaming Summer Movies Preview GuideInitial Thoughts'The Breadwinner' does not have a unique concept.

item.title: TV Review: ‘Spider-Noir’
item.description: The new live-action series ‘Spider-Noir’, which is set in an alternate universe within Sony's Spider-Man Universe and was created by Oren Uziel (‘Mortal Kombat’)., will premiere all eight episodes on MGM+ in the United States on May 25th before releasing globally on Prime Video May 27th.

item.title: Best Medicine
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Best Medicine.

In Best Medicine a brilliant surgeon leaves Boston to become a small-town doctor where he spent childhood summers. Despite his medical skills, his rude manner alienates locals as he battles hidden phobias and struggles with personal connections.

item.title: Widow's Bay
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Widow's Bay.

Widow's Bay is about a mysteriously cursed New England island and its superstitious citizens, led by a mayor who refuses to believe their warnings.

item.title: Margo's Got Money Troubles
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Margo's Got Money Troubles.

Margo Millet is the daughter of a Hooters waitress and an ex-pro wrestler. Now an unemployed single mother in her early 20s, Margo is struggling to make ends meet, leading her to launch an OnlyFans account. When her father reenters her life, she starts incorporating his lessons from the pro wrestling world into her OnlyFans work, leading to unexpected success.

item.title: Dutton Ranch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Dutton Ranch.

The Dutton Ranch, home to Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler, is a testament to the peace they sought, fought for, and nearly died for, as they've come to cherish their 7,000-acre land. With tough times and stiff competition, Beth and Rip do what they must to survive, all while ensuring Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

As Beth and Rip fight to build a future together - far from the ghosts of Yellowstone - they collide with brutal new realities and a ruthless rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire. In South Texas, blood runs deeper, forgiveness is fleeting, and the cost of survival might just be your soul.

item.title: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins.

The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins focuses on a disgraced former football player, who is on a mission to rehabilitate his image.

item.title: BEEF
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: BEEF.

They're frustrated, furious — and finally feeling something. Two strangers act on their darkest impulses in the aftermath of a road-rage incident.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off.

Scott Pilgrim meets the girl of his dreams, Ramona Flowers, only to find out her seven evil exes stand in the way of their love.

item.title: Memory of a Killer
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Memory of a Killer.

Memory of a Killer is a dramatic thriller about a hitman who develops early onset Alzheimer's. Angelo lives a double life as an assassin and a family man - which all worked out well until he was hit with early onset Alzheimer's. Now his worlds are colliding, putting his family in danger.

item.title: DTF St. Louis
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DTF St. Louis.

DTF St. Louis is a darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: DMV
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DMV.

DMV is set at the place everyone dreads going most: the DMV. Our quirky and lovable characters are making minimum wage, doing a thankless job where customers are annoyed before they even walk in the door. Good thing they have each other.

item.title: Rooster
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Rooster.

Rooster follows a middle aged author navigating a complicated relationship with his daughter.

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?
